docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-07-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, MARTIN AN INDIVIDUAL $372.57 PRINCIPAL, $6.78 INTEREST, $107.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $486.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, VICTOR

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, MARTIN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NTC OF MTN AND MTN FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, VICTOR HEARING SET FOR SEP-07-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 301

DISCOVERY 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF VICTOR JUAREZ' MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE : PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Sep-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF VICTOR JUAREZ' Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition filed. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge : Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. =(301/PJB)
